brief.request: Build a planning SaaS landing page for connected decision context.
brief.audience: teams evaluating whether reasoning can survive execution
brief.outcome: understand how outcome, owner, signals, and reasoning remain connected

floors: Phosphor icons, no text glyph arrows
live product UI instead of generated fake screenshots

generationBrief.prompt: Build a planning SaaS landing page for connected decision context.
generationBrief.audience: teams evaluating whether reasoning can survive execution
generationBrief.outcome: understand how outcome, owner, signals, and reasoning remain connected

orchestration.selectBy: topic fit, evidence strength, execution and convergence risk
imagery: plan section-specific image prompts before implementation
generate or source purposeful evidence where CSS would become a placeholder
keep labels, controls, data, and product state as live HTML
record focal-safe crop and mobile behavior
hero: fit headline, copy, action, and primary demonstration in initial desktop viewport
make product demonstrations show hierarchy, state, and consequence
orchestration.depth: preserve design investment and topic specificity through the conclusion
orchestration.composition: test content-led and golden candidates, release ratios when content fails
